topic.what: Inline cache-line-granularity weight decryption architecture for UMA edge AI accelerators
topic.how: ICE interposed on AXI bus intercepts 64-byte bursts and computes AES-256-CTR keystreams in parallel with DRAM fetches, streaming plaintext directly into isolated NPU SRAM
topic.why_matters: Enables hardware-backed DRM on UMA edge devices without bandwidth penalties or permanent memory carve-outs, protecting proprietary DNN weights from software and physical adversaries

characteristics.what_it_measures: Effective weight streaming bandwidth achieving near-line-rate performance
characteristics.evidence: Section 5.6 throughput model across i9/Xavier/Orin platforms
characteristics.context: Projected from pipelined hardware model; direct AES blocks at 72.0-94.4% due to sequential latency

characteristics.what_it_measures: DRAM traffic amplification factor for tensor tiles
characteristics.context: Page-level ICE incurs ceil(4096/t) multiplier; Tessera fetches exactly ceil(|T|/64)

characteristics.what_it_measures: Time to atomically clear plaintext SRAM on OS context switch
characteristics.evidence: Table 1 formula Tpreempt=SSRAM/BWSRAM+1.5µs across 3 NPU configs
characteristics.context: Dominant cost is SRAM zero-fill; hardware scrub engine prevents SW bypass

characteristics.vs_baseline: DRAM latency 38.7-71.6 ns provides ≥26.4ns positive slack
characteristics.evidence: Table 3 OpenSSL AES-NI measurements (107 iters, median) and pointer-chasing DRAM probes
characteristics.context: Positive slack ∆=TDRAM-Tks guarantees keystream completes before ciphertext arrival

characteristics.what_it_measures: Pipeline stall rate under continuous DMA with timing jitter
characteristics.evidence: Section 5.4 simulation of 10^5 cache-line requests with σks≈0.1Tks, σDRAM≈0.2TDRAM
characteristics.context: First-order jitter model abstracts DRAM scheduling details; buffer occupancy ≤3.7KB (58 lines)

characteristics.what_it_measures: Die area overhead for Tessera ICE
characteristics.context: <0.02% of modern edge AI die area; 4KB SRAM FIFO for keystream buffer

characteristics.what_it_measures: ICE power draw at peak sustained bandwidth
characteristics.vs_baseline: Multi-watt DDR5 PHY and NPU compute envelope
characteristics.context: AES-256 at 28nm achieves 0.5pJ/bit; functionally negligible against host SoC PPA

characteristics.what_it_measures: DRAM PHY energy saved per inference vs page-level ICE
characteristics.evidence: Section 5.8: Tessera loads 46.8MB at 1× vs 5.0× amplification
characteristics.context: Tessera DRAM access ~5.6mJ + ICE 0.19mJ vs page-level 28.0mJ
